title: Why Rei Reminded Shinji of a mother
display_title: Why Rei Reminded Shinji of a mother
wikitext:
[]: Why Rei Reminded Shinji of a mother Post by Asunji_Yuko » Thu Jun 15, 2023 2:32 pm Is it because he has very very distant, vague memories of his own mother, who Rei Ayanami is a clone of? That makes the most sense to me.

[]: Re: Why Rei Reminded Shinji of a mother Post by Blockio » Fri Jun 16, 2023 11:46 am That would indeed be the reason.
